title: 信实工业推出多款AI服务，涵盖通话、应用与家居
fact: At its annual shareholder meeting on Friday, the Mumbai-based conglomerate announced Jio Call Agent, an AI assistant that can join phone calls to transcribe conversations, generate summaries, and perform tasks such as booking cabs, ordering food, and making reservations. The service, which can be activated by saying “Hey Jio,” is expected to launch later this year for Jio’s more than 500 million users.

title: 智谱 AI 开源 GLM-5.2，编程基准仅落后 Claude Opus 约 1 个百分点
fact: 智谱 AI 开源新一代大模型 GLM-5.2，在编程基准测试中表现亮眼，仅落后顶级闭源模型 Claude Opus 约 1 个百分点。

title: 美国禁止Anthropic的Fable 5发布，但数字并不在意
fact: The US banned Anthropic’s Fable 5 release, but the numbers don’t seem to care

title: Pivot 获4000万美元B轮融资，推企业级AI代理采购操作系统，解决遗留软件未修复的问题
fact: Pivot raises $40m Series B to pitch an agentic-AI procurement OS at the enterprises legacy software has not fixed

title: Grupo Bimbo 借助 Microsoft Copilot Studio 构建的 AI 智能体，通过 Microsoft 365 Copilot 部署，将审计时间缩短 20%
fact: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio, deployed through Microsoft 365 Copilot "> Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio, deployed through Microsoft 365 Copilot

title: OpenBox AI 推出首个面向所有人的企业级AI信任平台，获500万美元种子轮融资
fact: As the White House unveils its National AI Legislative Framework and the EU AI Act enters enforcement, OpenBox delivers the governance infrastructure regulators are demanding — available for every organization, from day one.

title: Cloudflare 为 AI 智能体推出临时账户
fact: This is just one way we’re eliminating the signup barrier for agents. We recently announced a partnership with Stripe and a new protocol we co-designed that lets agents provision Cloudflare on behalf of their users — creating an account, starting a subscription, registering a domain, and getting an API token to deploy code, with no copy-pasting tokens or entering credit card details. Last month, we collaborated with WorkOS on the launch of auth.md , which anyone can adopt, to let agents provision new accounts using well-established, existing OAuth standards.

title: Union.ai融资1000万美元，简化机器学习工作流编排
fact: Union.ai raises $10M to simplify AI and ML workflow orchestration

title: 谷歌AI概览引导用户使用DuckDuckGo，后者安装量周增18%
fact: DuckDuckGo 美国区应用安装量平均周环比增长 18.1%

title: 诺贝尔奖得主John Jumper离开Google Deepmind加入Anthropic
fact: Google Deepmind loses another top AI researcher as Nobel laureate John Jumper leaves for Anthropic

title: 马斯克预测中国大模型2027年Q1追上Anthropic Fable，智谱唐杰回应"用不了那么久"
fact: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，北京时间 6 月 17 日，智谱正式上线并开源了新一代旗舰大模型 GLM-5.2。

title: 超越Claude Fable 5：智谱GLM 5.2登顶Design Arena网页设计AI榜单
fact: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，@Designarena 今天（6 月 20 日）在 X 平台发布推文， 宣布在 Design Arena 单轮 HTML 网页设计（非智能体）评测中，智谱的 GLM-5.2 模型超过 Claude Fable 5 等模型，首次登顶总分第一。

title: visionOS 27 今秋推送：M5 Vision Pro 头显独占 Siri 语音定制和苹果最强本地 AI 模型
fact: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 9to5Mac 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称在 visionOS 27 系统中， 苹果为 M5 Vision Pro 头显独占推出 Siri 语音定制（Voice Customization）和本地 AI 模型 AFM 3 Core Advanced。

title: 全球首个人形机器人通用小脑 GPT 模型：银河通用发布 AstraBrain-WBC 0.5
fact: 全球首个人形机器人通用小脑 GPT 模型：银河通用发布 AstraBrain-WBC 0.5 - IT之家

title: 英特尔与AMD联合发布ACE 1.15规范，增强x86架构AI算力
fact: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 Wccftech 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称 x86 生态系统咨询小组（EAG）发布 ACE 规范 1.15 版本， 通过原生矩阵乘法引擎和低精度格式增强 x86 架构的 AI 性能。

title: 印度首富安巴尼：印度必须成为 AI 的创造者和全球领导者
fact: 信实工业举行了年度股东大会，并发布 AI 通话助手 Jio Call Agent。
